title: Smoky Ukrainian Cabbage Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting dish that combines the flavors of Ukraine with the sweetness of cabbage and the smokiness of a savory broth.
instructions: Bring the smoky broth to a simmer in a large pot.
Add the chopped napa cabbage to the pot and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the thawed dumplings to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the dreamy sauce and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the cabbage and dumplings hot, garnished with additional dreamy sauce if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of rye bread or crusty rolls for dipping in the smoky broth.
